label: selected_moe_t16_down64_rejected_after_final_gate
scope: Reopened Task #3 selected-MoE GGUF decode launch-shape pass after final gates. Requirement: retain only if acceptable for both Q4_K_M and Q4_K_S and final-token sanity remains stable.
final_source_state: No source change retained; temporary gguf_t16_selected_gemv.hip launch-shape edits were reverted.

probes.name: selected_q4_q5_q6_t16_direct_down_block64
probes.change: Temporarily changed launch_qk_direct for all selected T16 down qtypes (Q4_K/Q5_K/Q6_K) from block 128 to block 64. This reduces per-block reduction waves for direct selected down GEMV and affects Q4_K_S Q4_K down plus Q4_K_M Q5_K/Q6_K down.
probes.validation: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests/test_gguf_t16_selected_gemv_decode.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_compact_moe_gemv_routing.py -q => passed (92 tests)
probes.reason: Throughput improved, but Q4_K_M final token IDs changed from the final-gate baseline [220,220,220] to [158729,158729,158729]. The Q5/Q6 selected-down reduction-width change is a math-contract drift and fails the correctness/sanity gate.

probes.name: selected_q4_t16_direct_down_block64_only
probes.change: Temporary narrowed variant: Q4_K selected down used block 64 while Q5_K/Q6_K selected down stayed at block 128. Intended to keep Q4_K_M's heavier Q5/Q6 down path on the final-gate reduction topology while preserving the Q4_K_S improvement.
probes.validation: Same selected/routing tests passed before benchmarking.
probes.reason: The narrowed Q4-only variant preserved Q4_K_M final-token sanity but regressed Q4_K_M decode on the first gate run, so Q4_K_S was not rerun for this narrowed variant.

decision: No additional selected-MoE source change retained. Selected down block64 is promising for Q4_K_S, but all-qtype block64 changes Q4_K_M generation and Q4-only block64 fails the Q4_K_M performance gate. Current accepted final-gate rows remain the source of truth.
